texto: All that glisters is not gold;Often have you heard that told.Many a man his life hath soldBut my outside to behold - Gilded tombs do worms infold;Had you been as wise as bold,Young in limbs, in judgement old,Your answer had not been inscrolled - Fare you well; your suit is cold.
explicacao: Citação de William Skakespeare sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “All that glisters is not gold;Often have you heard that told.Many a man his life hath soldBut my …” articula reflexao, inspriational, love-test em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como love-test e thoughts.
